$comment: Acceptance/experiment policy as DATA (plan Phase 4; replaces prose rules in the process-scenarios skill). An LLM evaluator is never the sole acceptance oracle: deterministic requirements gate every path. Version bumps on change; runs record which version judged them.

feedback.$comment: Rapid development: one simulation + one evaluation is enough to produce actionable feedback.

measurement.$comment: Changing the evaluator model/prompt changes the measuring instrument — never mix into a product comparison (ADR-0006).
